title: Puravankara is Hiring: Senior Property Advisor (Entry-Level)

jsonLd.title: Puravankara is Hiring: Senior Property Advisor (Entry-Level)
jsonLd.description:
We at Puravankara are looking for an experienced Senior Property Advisor based out of Rajkot. If you are a result-oriented professional with a passion for excellence, we want to hear from you.

About Puravankara:
Puravankara is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Provide advisory services on property investment and market trends
• Coordinate with architects, contractors, and project teams
• Prepare presentations and proposals for institutional clients
• Achieve monthly and quarterly sales targets
• Negotiate pricing, terms, and conditions on behalf of clients
• Liaise with banks and NBFCs for home loan assistance to customers
• Manage relationships with existing customers post-purchase

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Arch / M.Arch from recognized institution
• 3-6 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in GIS Tools
• Proficiency in Lease Administration
• Proficiency in Real Estate Law
• Proficiency in Market Research
• Proficiency in Contract Management
• Proficiency in CRM Software
• Proficiency in Property Management
• Proficiency in Title Search

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Flexible working hours
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Salary Range: 7 LPA - 15 LPA per annum

Location: Rajkot, Gujarat, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Puravankara!
